payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with vertical black handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the lower left door; reflective, slightly smudged surface and the appliance is partially edge-cropped at the top and sides; estimated distance ~1.5 m from camera.
